channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The mysterious hum heard around the world may finally have an explanation
item.description: The Hum, a mysterious sound reported globally for decades, may finally have a scientific explanation after researchers conducted tests.

item.title: Scientists just discovered a lost branch of Australiaâs marsupials
item.description: Fossils from Queensland suggest a newly recognized marsupial order may have survived in Australia for about 35 million years, reshaping evolutionary history.

item.title: Miniature universe in a bottle offers clues to life's origins
item.description: Scientists created cosmic dust in glass tubes by mimicking space conditions, revealing complex carbon-rich molecules.

item.title: Common antidepressant may ease long COVID's severe fatigue
item.description: A low-cost antidepressant showed promise for long COVID fatigue in a trial of 399 adults, offering new hope.
